issues.description: Action type is 'ReturnToHand' but card text says 'place at the bottom of the owner's deck' — should be a bottom-deck action, not hand return
Target is 'ChooseOpponentCharacter' but text says 'up to 1' — missing optional/max quantity constraint
Missing second action: conditional self-mill (place this Character at bottom of deck if you don't have 5+ cost-5+ Characters)
Missing condition on second action: 'if you do not have 5 Characters with a cost of 5 or more' — requires character count condition
